article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Telecom property tax assessment rates raised for 2026 in British Columbia
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has updated the rules used to calculate property tax values for telecommunications companies, raising key dollar figures — including a per-unit rate from $640 to $685 and another from $504 to $539 — effective for the 2026 assessment year.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
